'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=8tZRa8YXZ6ACLqM5ZfYgq.6QDm7AK7KvA9IlHzSWa0c-1773503222-1.0.1.1-E2yCGsSZhLEJ.MMsksPb_j.6dD.pgUnxKlA0N3fe6XY"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
